backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Inner Bloom app defining data types (JournalEntry, UserProfile, ProgressStats, etc.) and a static list of book recommendations, with mixins for blob storage and authorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping planned features (primarily extracting a MindfulnessGuide component from PreMeditationPage) to their target files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted catalog of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, page, and hook.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT_RUNBOOK.md: Step-by-step runbook for redeploying the Inner Bloom app without code changes, covering prerequisites and standard redeploy steps.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT_TROUBLESHOOTING.md: Structured troubleshooting template for diagnosing deployment failures across each stage (dependency install, backend deploy, Candid generation, frontend build/deploy, and runtime).
frontend/index.css: Root Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app that sets metadata, a favicon, a process.env compatibility shim, and global error handlers for runtime crash capture.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (landing, dashboard, pre-meditation, progress, journal, books, knowledge) and wraps the app in AppErrorBoundary, ThemeProvider, and ThemedToaster.
frontend/src/components/AmbientMusicCaro: A carousel component for selecting and playing ambient background sounds, with volume control, mute toggle, and touch swipe support.
frontend/src/components/AppErrorBoundary: A React class-based error boundary that catches unhandled errors and displays error details (message, stack trace, component stack) with a reload button.
frontend/src/components/CloudSyncErrorBa: An alert banner component that displays cloud sync or data-loading errors with contextual messages based on error type and a retry button.
frontend/src/components/DurationRangeInp: A labeled slider input component for selecting a session duration in minutes, with configurable min/max bounds and 5-minute steps.
frontend/src/components/FeatureCard.tsx: An empty file with no content.
frontend/src/components/FloatingNav.tsx: A fixed left-side floating navigation bar with animated icon buttons linking to Journal, Progress, Books, and Knowledge routes.
frontend/src/components/HamburgerMenu.ts: A mobile hamburger menu (slide-out sheet) providing theme toggling, authentication status display, logout, and navigation back to the start page.
frontend/src/components/JournalFiltersDr: A filter panel for journal entries supporting multi-select mood and energy filters, date range inputs, text search, and favorites toggle via popovers and checkboxes.
frontend/src/components/KnowledgeBookPag: A paginated book-style component for displaying knowledge content pages with swipe, keyboard, and dot navigation support. Handles slide animations, scroll-to-content behavior, and resets to the first page when the category changes.
frontend/src/components/KnowledgeCategor: A circular carousel component for selecting knowledge categories, showing the selected item centered with adjacent items partially visible. Supports touch swipe, keyboard arrow keys, and smooth CSS transitions.
frontend/src/components/KnowledgeQuizDia: A modal dialog that presents a shuffled multiple-choice quiz for a knowledge category, tracking answers per question with back/forward navigation and displaying a results summary on completion.
frontend/src/components/lotus-r3f/LotusM: A Three.js/R3F 3D lotus model component that animates petal opening, breathing scale, glow intensity, and rotation based on a LotusGrowthState derived from meditation progress.
frontend/src/components/lotus-r3f/LotusP: A React Three Fiber component that renders animated particles around a lotus, switching between chaotic Brownian motion and coherent orbital patterns based on the lotus growth state.
frontend/src/components/LotusCanvas.tsx: A full-screen canvas animation that renders an animated lotus flower with pulsing petals and floating particles, with visibility and style adjusted by variant, intensity, and light/dark theme.
frontend/src/components/MeditationCarous: A circular carousel for selecting a meditation type, displaying the selected card centered with adjacent cards scaled down. Supports touch swipe, and navigates through a fixed list of meditation options.
frontend/src/components/MeditationGuideS: A multi-step stepper component for displaying meditation guide steps with forward/backward navigation, dot indicators, swipe gesture support, and optional Benefits section rendering.
frontend/src/components/MeditationTimerR: A Canvas-based animated ring component that visualizes meditation timer progress with a wave effect, glowing edge, and theme-aware colors using requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/components/MeditationWaveFi: A Canvas-based circular indicator that fills from bottom to top with an animated wave surface to represent meditation session progress, supporting light and dark themes.
frontend/src/components/MindfulnessGuide: Renders a guided meditation walkthrough using MeditationGuideStepper for four meditation types (mindfulness, metta, visualization, IFS), each with predefined multi-step content.
frontend/src/components/MobileBackButton: A mobile-only fixed back button that navigates to the dashboard, optionally calling a custom onBack handler before navigating.
frontend/src/components/PageBackgroundSh: A layout shell component that wraps page content with a full-screen background and renders the LotusCanvas decorative background with configurable variant and intensity.
frontend/src/components/ProgressBowl.tsx: A Canvas-based animated singing bowl visualization that fills with liquid proportional to total meditation minutes (capped at 20,000), with wave animation and glow effects.
frontend/src/components/ProgressLotusR3F: A React Three Fiber component that renders a 3D animated lotus model with particles, auto-rotation, and growth state derived from total meditation minutes.
frontend/src/components/ProgressLotusSVG: Renders an animated SVG lotus flower that visually reflects meditation progress, with petal layers that open based on total minutes and streak-driven glow effects using a breathing/pulsing animation loop.
frontend/src/components/QuizDialog.tsx: A multi-step dialog quiz with 5 questions that scores user answers to recommend one of four meditation types (mindfulness, metta, visualization, IFS) and reports the result via a callback.
frontend/src/components/RitualSelectionM: A dialog modal that displays up to 5 saved meditation rituals in a carousel, allowing the user to select one to start or showing an empty-state message if none exist.
frontend/src/components/SavedRitualsCaro: A swipeable carousel component for browsing saved meditation rituals, supporting navigation, touch gestures, and deletion with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/SessionIndicator: A fixed UI indicator showing authentication status (guest or logged in) with buttons to return to the start page or log out, clearing relevant query caches on logout.
A reusable page navigation bar providing a back button, theme toggle, session indicator (desktop), and hamburger menu (mobile) for standard app pages.
frontend/src/components/ThemedToaster.ts: A thin wrapper around the Sonner Toaster component that renders it with a close button inside a named div.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) modes, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCloudOperation.ts: A composition hook that wraps cloud write operations with readiness-aware retry logic, using refs to track the latest actor and identity without triggering re-renders.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state via DFINITY's AuthClient and exposing identity, login status, and control functions to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useMeditationTimer.ts: A custom hook implementing a countdown meditation timer with start, pause, reset, seek, and duration-change controls, firing an onComplete callback when the timer reaches zero.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend data operations (books, quotes, journal entries, meditation sessions, rituals, progress stats, and user profiles), with guest-mode fallbacks using local storage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, imports Tailwind layers, and declares utility animations such as fade-in, breathe, glow-pulse, float, and wave.
frontend/src/lib/bookData.ts: Defines a `BookWithAmazon` interface extending the backend `Book` type and exports a static array of seven meditation/mindfulness book recommendations with Amazon links, tags, and icons.
frontend/src/lib/knowledgeContent.ts: Defines interfaces for quiz questions and technique content, then exports a `TECHNIQUE_CONTENT` array containing detailed multi-page educational content and quizzes for meditation techniques like mindfulness.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that renders the React app wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` providers into the root DOM element.
Renders the active meditation session UI with a wave-fill timer, play/pause control, and sliders for volume and time seeking, accepting all state and callbacks as props.
frontend/src/pages/BookRecommendationsPa: Displays a swipeable/navigable carousel of book recommendations from `bookData.ts`, supporting touch gestures and prev/next buttons, with theme toggling and navigation controls.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page that shows a random daily quote, a meditation type carousel, and handles navigation to pre-meditation setup, quiz dialog, or ritual selection modal based on the user's selection.
frontend/src/pages/JournalPage.tsx: Displays a filterable list of journal entries with support for editing reflections, toggling favorites, deleting entries, and importing/exporting data, with authenticated and guest mode handling.
frontend/src/pages/KnowledgePage.tsx: Renders a knowledge base page with category carousel, book-style content pager, and a quiz dialog, persisting quiz scores per user and supporting deep-link scrolling.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page with Internet Identity login, guest mode entry, theme toggle, and animated UI; redirects authenticated users to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PreMeditationPage.tsx: Multi-phase meditation flow page (setup, active, reflection) that collects mood/energy, manages ambient audio, records sessions, and creates journal entries.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressPage.tsx: Displays meditation progress stats (streak, total minutes, rank) with import/export functionality and a cloud sync error banner.
frontend/src/utils/ambientSounds.ts: Defines the list of ambient sound options (id, name, icon, audio path) and provides helper functions to look up sounds by ID.
frontend/src/utils/cloudSync.ts: Defines standardized cloud sync error codes and user-friendly messages, plus a helper function that maps raw backend error strings to appropriate user-facing messages.
frontend/src/utils/cloudSyncRetry.ts: Provides a retry wrapper for cloud operations that waits for actor/identity readiness, skips retries on authorization errors, and exposes helpers to classify authorization vs. readiness errors.
frontend/src/utils/exportImport.ts: Handles serialization of backend meditation data (journal entries, sessions, stats, rituals) to a safe JSON export format and provides validation/normalization helpers for deserializing imported data.
Manages localStorage persistence of knowledge quiz scores, keyed by user principal ID or a guest key, with a React hook for convenient access.
frontend/src/utils/lotusGrowthModel.ts: Calculates visual growth parameters for a lotus flower animation based on total meditation minutes (0–20,000), mapping progress through 24 phases to petal, glow, particle, and layer-openness values.
frontend/src/utils/meditationStorage.ts: Provides guest-only localStorage CRUD utilities for journal entries, progress data, and rituals, including a one-time migration from legacy storage keys.
frontend/src/utils/meditationType.ts: Validates and normalizes a string to a supported MeditationType enum value, falling back to mindfulness and treating 'meta' as an alias for 'metta'.
frontend/src/utils/progressRanks.ts: Defines six rank tiers mapped to the 0–20,000 total-minutes scale and exports helper functions to retrieve the current rank, next rank, and minutes remaining until promotion.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist/retrieve values via sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for the Inner Bloom meditation app, recording a pending refactor (AR-1) to extract a self-contained MindfulnessGuide component from PreMeditationPage with its own navigation and step logic.
